message:
test(conformance): add Series.argsort live oracle coverage

Add conformance harness support for Series.argsort():
- Oracle handler: op_series_argsort in pandas_oracle.py with ascending param
- Dispatch entry for series_argsort/series_argsort_default
- Enum variant: SeriesArgsort with operation_name mapping
- Execution handlers for both fixture and live oracle paths
- 4 live oracle tests:
  - ascending/descending sort order
  - with nulls (NA values placed last)
  - integer values

Tests verify pandas parity for returning indices that would sort the series.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
